---
title: "varying_coefficient_smooth"
generated: true
description: "Varying-coefficient smooth `s(x, by=z)` for a **continuous** `z`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:varying_coefficient_smooth -->
```python
varying_coefficient_smooth(x: Float[Array, ' n'], by: Float[Array, ' n'], n_basis: int = 10, *, degree: int = 3, penalty_order: int = 2, bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, center: bool = True) -> SplineBasis
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:varying_coefficient_smooth -->
Varying-coefficient smooth `s(x, by=z)` for a **continuous** `z`.

mgcv's `s(x, by=z)` with a numeric `by`: the smooth term is
$z\, f(x)$ -- a coefficient on `z` that varies smoothly with `x`.
The design is the marginal P-spline of `x` scaled row-wise by `z`; the
penalty is unchanged.  A single [`SplineBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/SplineBasis.qmd) for
[`gam_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:varying_coefficient_smooth -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `n` | — | `(n,)` covariate that the coefficient varies over. |
| `by` | `Float` | `n` | — | `(n,)` continuous covariate the smooth multiplies. |
| `n_basis` | `int` | — | `10` | Marginal P-spline parameters (see [`bspline_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/bspline_basis.qmd)). |
| `degree` | `int` | — | `3` | Marginal P-spline parameters (see [`bspline_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/bspline_basis.qmd)). |
| `penalty_order` | `int` | — | `2` | Marginal P-spline parameters (see [`bspline_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/bspline_basis.qmd)). |
| `bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | — | `None` | Marginal P-spline parameters (see [`bspline_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/bspline_basis.qmd)). |
| `center` | `bool` | — | `True` | Marginal P-spline parameters (see [`bspline_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/bspline_basis.qmd)). |

**Returns** `SplineBasis`. The [`SplineBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/SplineBasis.qmd) whose design is the marginal P-spline scaled row-wise by `by`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:varying_coefficient_smooth -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
